title: Looking for consultant for set up and possible future consulting
excerpt: Small interior design & manufactured product line business looking pricing for set up help. We’re currently using the free version, we are ready to go with a paid version. We also need help gaining a better understanding…

posts.author: Codor_Bh (Bailey Hess)
posts.cookedHtml:
Small interior design & manufactured product line business looking pricing for set up help. We’re currently using the free version, we are ready to go with a paid version. We also need help gaining a better understanding of how Quickbooks online and the monday.com CRM product integrate.

Looking for someone in the US, preferably US Pacific Time Zone.

posts.author: CarbonJon (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Codor_Bh and welcome to the monday.com community forums! There are a ton of great partners out there and allow me to introduce the team from CarbonWeb!

As a Channel and Advanced Delivery Partner with monday.com, we work with users every day to solve their biggest problems on the platform. Whether it’s learning all the basics or developing advanced third-party integrations, our team is here to help!

I’d appreciate the chance to connect with you and explore this workflow further. If you would like to grab some time with me please do so here: Calendly

Good luck as you develop your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Jonathan Grad

Account Manager

Carbon Web Print, LLC

Schedule Consultation | Website

Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : jgrad@carbonweb.co

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Codor_Bh thanks for reaching out and welcome to the monday.com community!
I would love to discuss some pricing with you on setup, training and some custom integrations with quickbooks online.

At timlittletech we have helped dozens of companies utilize monday to streamline sales, operations, product development and more. book a time here to discuss your use-case and if we would be a good fit to work together! Calendly | Tim Little

Also regarding quickbooks online there are some pre-built integrations that you can purchase. Or we can build a specific integration for your company; We run all our billing and pricing through quickbooks and monday.com and would be happy to get you started on that path!

We are based in California as well!
I look forward to connecting!

Best!

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tim,
As a Monday.com official partner, I help many businesses to build and optimize their workflows and working methods with the monday.com platform.

I’d like to mention that I’m pretty experienced with your needs as I’ve implemented such solutions for some previous customers

I’d love to work with you on this project and I can ensure you will be satisfied with the final delivery.

Feel free to contact me

heziboss@gmail.com

My Calendly

posts.author: Codor_Bh (Bailey Hess)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hezi,
Thanks for your reply! Couple of follow up questions- Where are you located and do you offer a free intro consultation or chat to discuss further?
Bailey

posts.author: deepvyas (Deep Vyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bailey,
Thanks for posting to monday.com community!

I am interested in discussing the QuickBooks integration you are looking.
You can search for some pre-built integrations for monthly subscription. But If you are looking forward to onetime solution for integration lets connect.

I would be happy to help you develop custom solution based on requirement.

Please let me know, If you are still looking to hire

Best Regards

Deep

posts.author: ggozalova (Nay Gozalova)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Codor_Bh I’m an ex-monday.com implementation consultant who now offers freelance consultation and setup services. I have worked with 100+ use cases and managed delivery of different sizes. The feedback from my customers have over been overwhelmingly positive as I go above and beyond to meet client requirements and also really passionate about pushing the product’s boundaries. If you want to have a free consultation, you can contact me here: Contact Us

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Codor_Bh

Welcome to the monday com community

Since you are planning to move from free to a paid version of monday Work OS and looking for an expert in the United States who can help you with the setup and consulting, I would suggest you get in touch with seasoned monday.com consultants. By seeking end-to-end consultation from an expert, you can gain a better understanding of how to integrate Quickbooks online with monday Work OS. With the help of a monday com consultant, you can streamline workflows, improve collaboration and achieve goals faster.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: ALWfe (Oleksiy)
posts.cookedHtml: Since you’re based in the US Pacific Time Zone, it might also be worth looking for a consultant who can work within your hours for smooth communication. I can recommend you to check out an it consulting services company that could help you set up QuickBooks Online, integrate it with Monday CRM, and streamline your business operations.
